code: import React from'react';import{useNavigate,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import{useApp}from'../context/AppContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Navbar=()=>{const navigate=useNavigate();const location=useLocation();const{isAdmin,logoutAdmin,selectedUser,logoutUser}=useApp();const navItems=[{label:'🏠 Home',path:'/'},{label:'📅 Calendar',path:'/calendar'},...(isAdmin?[{label:'👥 Users',path:'/admin/users'},{label:'🎉 New Cycle',path:'/admin/cycle'},{label:'🏖️ Holidays',path:'/admin/holidays'}]:[])];const handleLogout=()=>{if(isAdmin){logoutAdmin();}else{logoutUser();}navigate('/');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"nav",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"nav-logo",onClick:()=>navigate('/'),style:{cursor:'pointer'},children:"\uD83C\uDF8A PartyTracker"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{display:'flex',gap:'8px',alignItems:'center'},children:[navItems.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn ".concat(location.pathname===item.path?'btn-primary':'btn-ghost'),style:{padding:'8px 14px',fontSize:'13px'},onClick:()=>navigate(item.path),children:item.label},item.path)),(isAdmin||selectedUser)&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{display:'flex',alignItems:'center',gap:'8px',marginLeft:'8px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{style:{fontSize:'12px',color:'var(--text-muted)',background:'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)',padding:'6px 12px',borderRadius:'8px'},children:isAdmin?'⚙️ Admin':"\uD83D\uDC64 ".concat(selectedUser===null||selectedUser===void 0?void 0:selectedUser.name)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn-danger",style:{padding:'7px 12px',fontSize:'12px'},onClick:handleLogout,children:"Exit"})]}),!isAdmin&&!selectedUser&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn btn-secondary",style:{padding:'8px 14px',fontSize:'13px'},onClick:()=>navigate('/login'),children:"\uD83D\uDD10 Admin Login"})]})]});};export default Navbar;
